briefs.title: BC PST Exemption Rules Amended: Two Sections Repealed and Minor Wording Fix Applied
briefs.summary: BC updated its Provincial Sales Tax (PST) rules by removing two sections of the PST Regulation and fixing a typo ('Barnlitter' corrected to 'Barn litter'). The removed sections (45 and 46) dealt with specific PST exemption or refund conditions.
briefs.action_required: Check if your business relied on PST Regulation sections 45 or 46 and consult a tax advisor if so.
